payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall, narrow dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with two recessed rectangular panels and simple moulded edges, vertical grain and matte finish; crop shows the door nearly full-height with the left frame edge visible and no handle visible (approx. 0.8 m from camera).
